notableEvents.label: Matt McLain pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt McLain flies out to right fielder Sal Frelick.

notableEvents.label: Sal Stewart GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Elly De La Cruz out at 2nd. Sal Stewart out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ivan Johnson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ivan Johnson strikes out on a foul tip.
